title: BattleGrounds Modded
description: A Fabric 1.21.1 modpack created for a custom Fortnite-style battleground Minecraft server.
body: BattleGrounds Modded is a Fabric 1.21.1 PvP-focused modpack built for fast-paced, Fortnite-style gameplay on custom maps. Designed for multiplayer servers with guns, movement, and action. Are you ready for some exhilarating gameplay?
